Notice And Motion For Award Of Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Jul-29-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASOCIATION, INCORPORATED'S Motion For Award Of Attorney'S Fees is Granted, no opposition was filed. $9,000 in attorney's fees awarded. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported = (301/PJB)

Off Calendar Mar-25-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INCORPORATED'S Motion To Compel Attendance At Deposition And For Monetary Sanctions is granted. No opposition was filed. Defendants are ordered to appear for depositions and produce the requested documents no later than April 8, 2011. Sanctions in the amount of $340.00 awarded. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported = (301/PJB)
